codeReview.summary: Clean, minimal 9-line addition of the 'devin' agent config entry in src/agents.ts (lines 169-177). The config follows the goose pattern exactly as prescribed in architecture.md: non-universal agent with XDG-style config paths. All six expected behaviors are satisfied: name='devin', displayName='Devin for Terminal', skillsDir='.devin/skills', globalSkillsDir=join(configHome,'devin/skills') resolving to ~/.config/devin/skills, detection via existsSync(join(configHome,'devin')), and isUniversalAgent('devin') returns false. Entry is correctly placed alphabetically between 'deepagents' and 'droid'. No dead code, no edge cases beyond established patterns. The remaining diff is mission state bookkeeping (.mission/ files) which is correctly maintained. Tests are deferred to the devin-unit-tests feature and validation scripts to devin-docs-sync, both by design per the feature decomposition.

summary: Pass. The devin agent config is a correct, pattern-consistent 9-line addition to src/agents.ts that satisfies all six expected behaviors. No code quality issues found. Tests and validation scripts are appropriately deferred to downstream features.
